title: hippeastrum × henryae
intro: Hippeastrum × henryae is a hybrid plant species in the family Amaryllidaceae, derived from the cross between Hippeastrum hybridum and Lycoris squamigera. The plant's bulbs contain alkaloids with reported medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral activities. Consuming Hippeastrum × henryae in moderation is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing blood pressure, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system. The plant's bulbs can be used to prepare herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, although its safe use and dosage should be carefully researched and consulted with a healthcare professional.
